//: Monorepo Vercel config. The Vercel project's Root Directory should be set to 'apps/web' in the dashboard; that directory's own vercel.json (apps/web/vercel.json) holds the build/install commands, regions, security headers, and API rewrite. This root file documents intent and pins the framework + ignored-build behavior for the monorepo so unrelated package changes don't trigger a web redeploy.
